chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-595 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.2876/2024 (Urgent). 2. For order on CMA No.2877/2024 (Exemption). 3. For order on CMA No.2878/2024 (Stay). 4. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 6th February 2024 Ms. Dilkhurram Shaheen, Advocate for Petitioner. -*-*-*-*-*- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, submits that petitioner does not want to press instant Constitutional Petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
